channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Guerrero, Blue Jays agree to a $500 million, 14-year deal that starts in 2026, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Vladimir Guerrero Jr. and the Toronto Blue Jays agreed to a $500 million, 14-year contract that starts in 2026, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press, a deal that removes what would have been the biggest star from next offseason’s free-agent market.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sagstrom beats Coughlin 1-up in T-Mobile Match Play to end 5-year drought on LPGA Tour
item.description: NORTH LAS VEGAS, Nev. (AP) — The five-year wait to end her LPGA Tour victory drought appeared to be a matter of time when Madelene Sagstrom went 4-up just six holes into the final of the T-Mobile Match Play. Then it nearly got away from her, and Sagstrom even briefly fell behind at one point.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn dominates South Carolina in women's national championship
item.description: A huge win for the UConn Huskies Sunday as the team dominated the South Carolina Gamecocks and made history inside Amalie Arena.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors’ rotation options look strong with Kuminga, Payton, Santos offering different skills
item.description: Warriors coach Steve Kerr on night-to-night roles changing for players: “The only way it works is if everybody embraces it, and that’s what’s happening.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Mariners' Robles carted off field with shoulder injury after making dazzling catch against Giants
item.description: Seattle Mariners outfielder Victor Robles injured his left shoulder and was carted off the field after making a dazzling catch in the ninth inning of a 5-4 loss to the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Eric He, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin fired just about the perfect shot from the place on the ice that has defined his remarkable career. When the puck hit the net, it made him the top goal scorer in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: UConn's Geno Auriemma gives no indication of slowing down after winning 12th NCAA title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Geno Auriemma has accomplished more than just about anyone in college basketball. The 71-year-old UConn coach passed former Stanford women’s basketball coach Tara VanDerveer as the winningest coach in Division 1 earlier this season.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A healthy Azzi Fudd stars as UConn wins women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — This time, Azzi Fudd was healthy. And she made a big difference for UConn. Fudd was named the Most Outstanding Player of the Final Four after leading the Huskies to the program's 12th national championship.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josef Martinez’s hat trick powers San Jose Earthquakes over DC United in MLS 30th-year celebration game
item.description: 29 years after San Jose's MLS team debuted as the Clash, the Earthquakes beat DC United to stir memories of MLS' first-ever game at Spartan Stadium
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Hamlin takes the lead out of pits and holds off Byron in overtime to win at Darlington Raceway
item.description: Denny Hamlin took his last lead out of the pits right before an overtime finish and then held off William Byron to win the Goodyear 400 at Darlington Raceway on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Pete Iacobelli, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: SF Giants secure second straight sweep, walk off Mariners to cap home-opening series
item.description: The Giants improved to 8-1 and swept their home-opening series against the Seattle Mariners with a 5-4, walk-off win Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: How Alex Ovechkin became the top goal-scorer in NHL history
item.description: Alex Ovechkin became the greatest goal scorer in NHL history because of a never-before-seen combination of a wicked shot, consistency over two decades and remarkable durability that kept him on the ice long enough to break Wayne Gretzky's record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 on Sunday behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Dough Feinberg, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pirates draw heat for removing Roberto Clemente tribute in right field
item.description: The Pittsburgh Pirates caused a rift in the fan base over the weekend as the team appeared to remove a tribute to baseball legend Roberto Clemente.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin finishes the 'GR8 Chase' by breaking Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin of the Washington Capitals has broken the NHL goals record held by Wayne Gretzky by scoring the 895th of his career. Ovechkin beat fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on the power play Sunday at the New York Islanders to pass Gretzky and take sole possession of the record.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cedric Dempsey, the former NCAA president who led in time of transition and growth, dies at 92
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Cedric Dempsey, the former NCAA president who helped turn Arizona into a national power as athletic director before leading the national organization through key years of transition and growth, died Saturday in San Diego, the NCAA said. He was 92.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston completes epic comeback in Final Four classic against Duke despite Cooper Flagg's big game
item.description: Houston trailed by as many as 14 in the second half, but an 8-0 run in the final 33 seconds completed their comeback against Duke in the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: JuJu Watkins chosen over Paige Bueckers for women's college basketball's most prestigious award
item.description: USC's JuJu Watkins was selected the 2025 winner of the John R. Wooden Award Saturday, beating out UConn star Paige Bueckers after a hotly contested race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Youth soccer coach linked to teen player's death arrested on separate sexual assault charge, family says
item.description: A youth soccer coach who was reportedly questioned in the death of one of his teen players, was arrested on a separate sexual assault charge, the boy's family said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carmelo Anthony and Sue Bird highlight Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts winless champs LA Galaxy in crucial western showdown
item.description: Real Salt Lake (2-4-0, T-11th place Western Conference) returns home Saturday afternoon when they host reigning MLS Cup Champions LA Galaxy at America First Field. RSL is coming off a road loss on Saturday night and hope to get their season back on track against a struggling LA side.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Kanon Catchings enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a disappointing freshman season, BYU forward Kanon Catchings has entered the transfer portal. The highly-touted 4-star recruit came to BYU with high expectations. But injuries and lack of playing time derailed his freshman season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 2025 NASCAR Chicago Street Race: City, NASCAR announce traffic plan for before, during, after race weekend
item.description: CHICAGO — The City of Chicago and NASCAR officials have announced the traffic plan for the third NASCAR Chicago Street Race, scheduled for July 5-6 (Saturday and Sunday) in Grant Park.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
